===Pokémon Adventures===
[[File:Ryme Adventures.png|thumb|right|200px|Ryme in [[Pokémon Adventures]]]]
Ryme debuted in <!--[[PASV27]]-->the {{MangaArc|Scarlet & Violet}}. She was first seen in [[Montenevera]], where she was ordered by the {{pal|Pokémon League}} to monitor {{Scarlet}}, who had been deemed potentially dangerous for illegally enrolling into [[Uva Academy]] under a false identity. She was conflicted, as she had already agreed to [[Tyme|her sister]]'s request to help Scarlet find information on the [[treasures of ruin|Ruinous Pokémon]].

Later, at the entrance to Montenevera, {{adv|Nemona}} found Ryme standing near a group of unconscious [[Eeveelution]]s. Nemona theorized the Pokémon belonged to [[Penny]], a girl she saw being taken away by some {{tc|Team Star Grunt}}s shortly before she arrived. After a conversation with [[Cassiopeia]], Nemona learned that the kidnapping victim as actually Scarlet disguised as Penny and she was taken to [[North Province (Area Two)]]. Nemona immediately tried to go save her friend, but was warned by Ryme and [[Grusha]] that traversing [[Glaseado Mountain]] by herself could be dangerous. Ryme had Grusha safely transport Nemona down the mountain. 
{{-}}
